Figure 4. S2ANTA kernel latency on Llama 8B tensor shapes for 1 decoding step. (a) S2ANTA-prop demonstrates a 1.50× speedup relative to FlashInfer at a 32k-token context. (b) S2ANTA-flash similarly exhibits a 1.51× speedup. Both operating points (S = 128 for prop, S = 2048 for flash) correspond to configurations that recover baseline accuracy (Table 1).
